---
applyTo: "frontend/**"
---
<!-- Generated by scripts/sync_agent_adapters.py from scripts/agent_adapter_manifest.json. Do not edit manually. -->
- Read frontend/AGENTS.md for frontend-specific rules.
- Frontend is Streamlit (Python), not React.
- Use st.session_state for persistence across reruns.
- Backend URL from os.getenv('BACKEND_URL', 'http://127.0.0.1:8000').
- Include medical disclaimers in prediction views.
